name: PolyLine
summary: The PolyLine class represents a line that consists of one or more line segments. To create a polyline, you have to give a list of the points that will form the polyline. The first point in the list will be connected with the second point in the list, the second point in the list will be connected with the third point in the list, etc.

constructors.name: PolyLine
constructors.summary: Instantiates a polyline with the given Points.

methods.name: Equals
methods.summary: Returns true if the objects are equal.

methods.name: GetHashCode
methods.summary: Returns a hash code for a polyline. Notice, in extremely rare cases, you might not get the same hash code for two polylines even though they are considered equal! This should, however, happen only in extremely rare cases!

methods.name: Length
methods.summary: Returns the length of a polyline.

properties.name: Points
properties.summary: The points the polyline consists of.
